calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of minor.
Dept. 514, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. WILLIS-MCGHEE, CSR KAREN HELD, #2857

Petitioner XIAO JUAN LIANG & PAY SING CHAN was present in pro per as parents of LUCIANO CHAN WEI XIONG AKA BRIAN WEI CHAN.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to LUCIANO WEI CHAN.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
